articles.author: Megan Janetsky, Will Weissert
articles.title: Mexico’s Sheinbaum takes a firmer stance toward the US over migrant deaths and Cuba - AP News
articles.description: Mexican President Claudia Sheinbaum has recently been taking a firmer stance with the U.S., defying pressures where other countries have caved. This shift follows changes in geopolitical dynamics in the Americas and the Middle East, giving her more leverage. …
articles.content: MEXICO CITY (AP) The Mexican government on Tuesday protested the deaths of its citizens in U.S. immigration custody as President Claudia Sheinbaum pushes back against U.S. President Donald Trumps pol… [+7010 chars]
